parameters.formDescription: Enter a supplier ID (SuID) to generate an ad hoc supplier pre-read in your meeting-note format. Optional notes let you tailor the draft before sending.

values.placeholder:
SEND NEW SKU PLAYBOOK
WILL INCREASE BUDGET FOR ADS

values.formSubmittedText: Your ad hoc supplier pre-read is being generated and will be emailed shortly.

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $json;
const trim = (value) => String(value ?? '').trim();
const supplierId = trim(input.supplier_id).replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
if (!supplierId) {
  throw new Error('Enter a valid numeric supplier_id / SuID.');
}

const recipientEmail = trim(input.recipient_email) || 'bhannigan@wayfair.com';
const teamName = trim(input.team_name);
const portfolioOwner = trim(input.portfolio_owner) || 'Hannigan, Benjamin';
const unfindablesNotes = trim(input.unfindables_notes);
const adHocNotes = trim(input.ad_hoc_notes);
const dashboardUrl = 'https://partners.wayfair.com/d/hxVugArzfrkD6YuI94A2dq/monthly-supplier-report';

const escapeSql = (value) => value.replace(/'/g, "''");
const portfolioOwnerSql = escapeSql(portfolioOwner);
const supplierIdSql = escapeSql(supplierId);

const sqlQuery = `WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), MONTH) AS current_month_start,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), MONTH) AS prior_month_start,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE_SUB(DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), INTERVAL 1 YEAR), MONTH) AS prior_year_month_start,
    '${portfolioOwnerSql}' AS portfolio_owner,
    '${supplierIdSql}' AS supplier_id
),
selected_months AS (
  SELECT current_month_start AS month_start FROM params
  UNION ALL SELECT prior_month_start FROM params
  UNION ALL SELECT prior_year_month_start FROM params
),
requested_supplier AS (
  SELECT
    params.supplier_id AS supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(dim.origsuname) AS supplier_name,
    COUNT(dim.supplierkey) > 0 AS supplier_exists
  FROM params
  LEFT JOIN \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_dim_supplier\` AS dim
    ON dim.srmcontactname = params.portfolio_owner
   AND CAST(dim.origsuid AS STRING) = params.supplier_id
  GROUP BY params.supplier_id
),
currency AS (
  SELECT
    ANY_VALUE(ExchangeRate) AS exchange_rate,
    ANY_VALUE(currency_symbol) AS currency_symbol
  FROM \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.vw_local_currency_conversion\`
  WHERE CuyShortName = 'USD'
),
wsc_order_rows AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) AS month_start,
    CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) AS supplier_id,
    retail_dim_supplier.origsuname AS supplier_name,
    orders.id AS order_id,
    COALESCE(orders.productcostnorebates, 0) * COALESCE(currency.exchange_rate, 1) AS wsc
  FROM \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_sku_store_date_agg\` AS retail_sku_store_date
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(retail_sku_store_date.supplier_struct) AS supplier_struct
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(supplier_struct.supplier_part_struct) AS supplier_part_struct
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(supplier_part_struct.orders) AS orders
  LEFT JOIN \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_dim_supplier\` AS retail_dim_supplier
    ON retail_dim_supplier.supplierkey = supplier_struct.supplierkey
  CROSS JOIN currency
  CROSS JOIN params
  WHERE retail_sku_store_date.brandname IN ('AllModern', 'Birch Lane', 'Joss & Main', 'Wayfair', 'Perigold')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.styname IN ('United States', 'Canada', 'Germany', 'Ireland', 'UK')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.agg_level = 'DAILY'
    AND retail_dim_supplier.srmcontactname = params.portfolio_owner
    AND CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) = params.supplier_id
    AND DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) IN (
      SELECT month_start FROM selected_months
    )
    AND orders.id IS NOT NULL
),
wsc_deduped AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    order_id,
    ANY_VALUE(wsc) AS wsc
  FROM wsc_order_rows
  GROUP BY month_start, supplier_id, supplier_name, order_id
),
monthly_wsc AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    ANY_VALUE(currency.currency_symbol) AS currency_symbol,
    SUM(wsc) AS monthly_wsc
  FROM wsc_deduped
  CROSS JOIN currency
  GROUP BY month_start, supplier_id
),
wsc_summary AS (
  SELECT
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    ANY_VALUE(currency_symbol) AS currency_symbol,
    SUM(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, monthly_wsc, 0)) AS current_wsc,
    SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, monthly_wsc, 0)) AS prior_month_wsc,
    SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, monthly_wsc, 0)) AS prior_year_wsc
  FROM monthly_wsc
  CROSS JOIN params
  GROUP BY supplier_id
),
traffic_rows AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) AS month_start,
    CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) AS supplier_id,
    retail_dim_supplier.origsuname AS supplier_name,
    traffic_source.id AS traffic_source_id,
    COALESCE(traffic_source.skuvisits, 0) AS visits,
    COALESCE(traffic_source.skuconverted, 0) AS converted
  FROM \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_sku_store_date_agg\` AS retail_sku_store_date
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(retail_sku_store_date.traffic_source) AS traffic_source
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(retail_sku_store_date.supplier_struct) AS supplier_struct
  LEFT JOIN \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_dim_supplier\` AS retail_dim_supplier
    ON retail_dim_supplier.supplierkey = supplier_struct.supplierkey
  CROSS JOIN params
  WHERE retail_sku_store_date.brandname IN ('AllModern', 'Birch Lane', 'Joss & Main', 'Wayfair', 'Perigold')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.styname IN ('United States', 'Canada', 'Germany', 'Ireland', 'UK')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.agg_level = 'DAILY'
    AND retail_dim_supplier.srmcontactname = params.portfolio_owner
    AND CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) = params.supplier_id
    AND DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) IN (
      SELECT month_start FROM selected_months
    )
    AND traffic_source.id IS NOT NULL
),
traffic_deduped AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    traffic_source_id,
    ANY_VALUE(visits) AS visits,
    ANY_VALUE(converted) AS converted
  FROM traffic_rows
  GROUP BY month_start, supplier_id, supplier_name, traffic_source_id
),
monthly_traffic AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    SUM(visits) AS monthly_visits,
    SUM(converted) AS monthly_converted,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(converted), SUM(visits)) AS monthly_cvr
  FROM traffic_deduped
  GROUP BY month_start, supplier_id
),
traffic_summary AS (
  SELECT
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    SUM(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, monthly_visits, 0)) AS current_visits,
    SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, monthly_visits, 0)) AS prior_month_visits,
    SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, monthly_visits, 0)) AS prior_year_visits,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, monthly_converted, 0)),
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, monthly_visits, 0))
    ) AS current_cvr,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, monthly_converted, 0)),
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, monthly_visits, 0))
    ) AS prior_month_cvr,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, monthly_converted, 0)),
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, monthly_visits, 0))
    ) AS prior_year_cvr
  FROM monthly_traffic
  CROSS JOIN params
  GROUP BY supplier_id
),
availability_rows AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) AS month_start,
    CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) AS supplier_id,
    retail_dim_supplier.origsuname AS supplier_name,
    retail_ops.id AS ops_id,
    CASE
      WHEN UPPER(retail_ops_dims.program) NOT IN ('CASTLEGATE', 'DROPSHIP')
      THEN COALESCE(availability_global_num, 0)
      ELSE 0
    END AS availability_num,
    CASE
      WHEN UPPER(retail_ops_dims.program) NOT IN ('CASTLEGATE', 'DROPSHIP')
      THEN COALESCE(availability_global_denom, 0)
      ELSE 0
    END AS availability_denom
  FROM \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_sku_store_date_agg\` AS retail_sku_store_date
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(retail_sku_store_date.supplier_struct) AS supplier_struct
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(supplier_struct.supplier_part_struct) AS supplier_part_struct
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(supplier_part_struct.opdimensions) AS retail_ops_dims
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(supplier_part_struct.ops) AS retail_ops
  LEFT JOIN \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_dim_supplier\` AS retail_dim_supplier
    ON retail_dim_supplier.supplierkey = supplier_struct.supplierkey
  CROSS JOIN params
  WHERE retail_sku_store_date.brandname IN ('AllModern', 'Birch Lane', 'Joss & Main', 'Wayfair', 'Perigold')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.styname IN ('United States', 'Canada', 'Germany', 'Ireland', 'UK')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.agg_level = 'DAILY'
    AND retail_dim_supplier.srmcontactname = params.portfolio_owner
    AND CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) = params.supplier_id
    AND DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) IN (
      SELECT month_start FROM selected_months
    )
    AND retail_ops.id IS NOT NULL
),
availability_deduped AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    ops_id,
    MAX(availability_num) AS availability_num,
    MAX(availability_denom) AS availability_denom
  FROM availability_rows
  GROUP BY month_start, supplier_id, supplier_name, ops_id
),
monthly_availability AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    SUM(availability_num) AS availability_num,
    SUM(availability_denom) AS availability_denom,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(availability_num), SUM(availability_denom)) AS availability_rate
  FROM availability_deduped
  GROUP BY month_start, supplier_id
),
availability_summary AS (
  SELECT
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, availability_num, 0)),
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, availability_denom, 0))
    ) AS current_availability,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, availability_num, 0)),
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, availability_denom, 0))
    ) AS prior_month_availability,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, availability_num, 0)),
      SUM(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, availability_denom, 0))
    ) AS prior_year_availability
  FROM monthly_availability
  CROSS JOIN params
  GROUP BY supplier_id
),
mrpi_rows AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) AS month_start,
    DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, WEEK(SUNDAY)) AS week_start,
    CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) AS supplier_id,
    retail_dim_supplier.origsuname AS supplier_name,
    supplier_struct.id AS supplier_struct_id,
    COALESCE(supplier_struct.mrpi28d_numerator, 0) AS mrpi_num,
    COALESCE(supplier_struct.mrpi28d_denominator, 0) AS mrpi_denom
  FROM \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_sku_store_date_agg\` AS retail_sku_store_date
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(retail_sku_store_date.supplier_struct) AS supplier_struct
  LEFT JOIN \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_dim_supplier\` AS retail_dim_supplier
    ON retail_dim_supplier.supplierkey = supplier_struct.supplierkey
  CROSS JOIN params
  WHERE retail_sku_store_date.brandname IN ('AllModern', 'Birch Lane', 'Joss & Main', 'Wayfair', 'Perigold')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.styname IN ('United States', 'Canada', 'Germany', 'Ireland', 'UK')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.agg_level = 'WEEKLY'
    AND retail_dim_supplier.srmcontactname = params.portfolio_owner
    AND CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) = params.supplier_id
    AND DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) IN (
      SELECT month_start FROM selected_months
    )
    AND supplier_struct.id IS NOT NULL
),
mrpi_deduped AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    week_start,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    supplier_struct_id,
    ANY_VALUE(mrpi_num) AS mrpi_num,
    ANY_VALUE(mrpi_denom) AS mrpi_denom
  FROM mrpi_rows
  GROUP BY month_start, week_start, supplier_id, supplier_name, supplier_struct_id
),
weekly_mrpi AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    week_start,
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(mrpi_num), SUM(mrpi_denom)) AS mrpi_rate
  FROM mrpi_deduped
  GROUP BY month_start, week_start, supplier_id
),
monthly_mrpi_snapshot AS (
  SELECT month_start, supplier_id, supplier_name, mrpi_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      month_start,
      supplier_id,
      supplier_name,
      mrpi_rate,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY month_start, supplier_id ORDER BY week_start DESC) AS row_num
    FROM weekly_mrpi
  )
  WHERE row_num = 1
),
mrpi_summary AS (
  SELECT
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    MAX(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, mrpi_rate, NULL)) AS current_mrpi,
    MAX(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, mrpi_rate, NULL)) AS prior_month_mrpi,
    MAX(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, mrpi_rate, NULL)) AS prior_year_mrpi
  FROM monthly_mrpi_snapshot
  CROSS JOIN params
  GROUP BY supplier_id
),
wsi_rows AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) AS month_start,
    DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, WEEK(SUNDAY)) AS week_start,
    CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) AS supplier_id,
    retail_dim_supplier.origsuname AS supplier_name,
    CAST(wpi_wsi.indexdate AS DATE) AS index_date,
    wpi_wsi.id AS wpi_wsi_id,
    COALESCE(wpi_wsi.WSI28D_Numerator, 0) AS wsi_num,
    COALESCE(wpi_wsi.WSI28D_Denominator, 0) AS wsi_denom
  FROM \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_sku_store_date_agg\` AS retail_sku_store_date
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(retail_sku_store_date.supplier_struct) AS supplier_struct
  LEFT JOIN UNNEST(supplier_struct.wpi_wsi) AS wpi_wsi
  LEFT JOIN \`wf-gcp-us-ae-retail-prod.cm_reporting.retail_dim_supplier\` AS retail_dim_supplier
    ON retail_dim_supplier.supplierkey = supplier_struct.supplierkey
  CROSS JOIN params
  WHERE retail_sku_store_date.brandname IN ('AllModern', 'Birch Lane', 'Joss & Main', 'Wayfair', 'Perigold')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.styname IN ('United States', 'Canada', 'Germany', 'Ireland', 'UK')
    AND retail_sku_store_date.agg_level = 'WEEKLY'
    AND retail_dim_supplier.srmcontactname = params.portfolio_owner
    AND CAST(retail_dim_supplier.origsuid AS STRING) = params.supplier_id
    AND DATE_TRUNC(retail_sku_store_date.date, MONTH) IN (
      SELECT month_start FROM selected_months
    )
    AND wpi_wsi.id IS NOT NULL
),
wsi_deduped AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    week_start,
    supplier_id,
    supplier_name,
    index_date,
    wpi_wsi_id,
    ANY_VALUE(wsi_num) AS wsi_num,
    ANY_VALUE(wsi_denom) AS wsi_denom
  FROM wsi_rows
  GROUP BY month_start, week_start, supplier_id, supplier_name, index_date, wpi_wsi_id
),
weekly_wsi AS (
  SELECT
    month_start,
    week_start,
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    ANY_VALUE(index_date) AS index_date,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(wsi_num), SUM(wsi_denom)) AS wsi_rate
  FROM wsi_deduped
  GROUP BY month_start, week_start, supplier_id
),
monthly_wsi_snapshot AS (
  SELECT month_start, supplier_id, supplier_name, wsi_rate
  FROM (
    SELECT
      month_start,
      supplier_id,
      supplier_name,
      wsi_rate,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY month_start, supplier_id
        ORDER BY week_start DESC, index_date DESC
      ) AS row_num
    FROM weekly_wsi
  )
  WHERE row_num = 1
),
wsi_summary AS (
  SELECT
    supplier_id,
    ANY_VALUE(supplier_name) AS supplier_name,
    MAX(IF(month_start = params.current_month_start, wsi_rate, NULL)) AS current_wsi,
    MAX(IF(month_start = params.prior_month_start, wsi_rate, NULL)) AS prior_month_wsi,
    MAX(IF(month_start = params.prior_year_month_start, wsi_rate, NULL)) AS prior_year_wsi
  FROM monthly_wsi_snapshot
  CROSS JOIN params
  GROUP BY supplier_id
)
SELECT
  requested_supplier.supplier_id,
  COALESCE(
    requested_supplier.supplier_name,
    wsc_summary.supplier_name,
    traffic_summary.supplier_name,
    availability_summary.supplier_name,
    mrpi_summary.supplier_name,
    wsi_summary.supplier_name
  ) AS supplier_name,
  requested_supplier.supplier_exists,
  params.portfolio_owner,
  params.current_month_start,
  params.prior_month_start,
  params.prior_year_month_start,
  FORMAT_DATE('%B %Y', params.current_month_start) AS current_month_label,
  FORMAT_DATE('%B %Y', params.prior_month_start) AS prior_month_label,
  FORMAT_DATE('%B %Y', params.prior_year_month_start) AS prior_year_month_label,
  wsc_summary.currency_symbol,
  wsc_summary.current_wsc,
  wsc_summary.prior_month_wsc,
  wsc_summary.prior_year_wsc,
  wsc_summary.current_wsc - wsc_summary.prior_month_wsc AS mom_wsc_change,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(wsc_summary.current_wsc - wsc_summary.prior_month_wsc, wsc_summary.prior_month_wsc) AS mom_wsc_pct,
  wsc_summary.current_wsc - wsc_summary.prior_year_wsc AS yoy_wsc_change,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(wsc_summary.current_wsc - wsc_summary.prior_year_wsc, wsc_summary.prior_year_wsc) AS yoy_wsc_pct,
  traffic_summary.current_visits,
  traffic_summary.prior_month_visits,
  traffic_summary.prior_year_visits,
  traffic_summary.current_cvr,
  traffic_summary.prior_month_cvr,
  traffic_summary.prior_year_cvr,
  traffic_summary.current_visits - traffic_summary.prior_month_visits AS mom_visits_change,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(traffic_summary.current_visits - traffic_summary.prior_month_visits, traffic_summary.prior_month_visits) AS mom_visits_pct,
  traffic_summary.current_visits - traffic_summary.prior_year_visits AS yoy_visits_change,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(traffic_summary.current_visits - traffic_summary.prior_year_visits, traffic_summary.prior_year_visits) AS yoy_visits_pct,
  traffic_summary.current_cvr - traffic_summary.prior_month_cvr AS mom_cvr_change,
  traffic_summary.current_cvr - traffic_summary.prior_year_cvr AS yoy_cvr_change,
  availability_summary.current_availability,
  availability_summary.prior_month_availability,
  availability_summary.prior_year_availability,
  availability_summary.current_availability - availability_summary.prior_month_availability AS mom_availability_change,
  availability_summary.current_availability - availability_summary.prior_year_availability AS yoy_availability_change,
  mrpi_summary.current_mrpi,
  mrpi_summary.prior_month_mrpi,
  mrpi_summary.prior_year_mrpi,
  mrpi_summary.current_mrpi - mrpi_summary.prior_month_mrpi AS mom_mrpi_change,
  mrpi_summary.current_mrpi - mrpi_summary.prior_year_mrpi AS yoy_mrpi_change,
  wsi_summary.current_wsi,
  wsi_summary.prior_month_wsi,
  wsi_summary.prior_year_wsi,
  wsi_summary.current_wsi - wsi_summary.prior_month_wsi AS mom_wsi_change,
  wsi_summary.current_wsi - wsi_summary.prior_year_wsi AS yoy_wsi_change
FROM params
CROSS JOIN requested_supplier
LEFT JOIN wsc_summary
  ON wsc_summary.supplier_id = requested_supplier.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN traffic_summary
  ON traffic_summary.supplier_id = requested_supplier.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN availability_summary
  ON availability_summary.supplier_id = requested_supplier.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN mrpi_summary
  ON mrpi_summary.supplier_id = requested_supplier.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN wsi_summary
  ON wsi_summary.supplier_id = requested_supplier.supplier_id`;

return [{
  json: {
    supplierId,
    recipientEmail,
    teamName,
    portfolioOwner,
    unfindablesNotes,
    adHocNotes,
    dashboardUrl,
    sqlQuery,
  },
}];
